title: disterigma microphyllum
intro: Disterigma microphyllum, also known as the small-leaved disterigma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Philippines and other parts of Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Disterigma microphyllum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to help manage diabetes and other metabolic disorders. Disterigma microphyllum is often prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
